rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions in component type scopes when they refer to component ports.
Use component implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings like assignments.
generic_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be syntactically valid and placed in appropriate AADL scopes.
Ensure all identifiers in AGREE expressions are declared or available in the AADL model.
Align AGREE types with the actual AADL data types of ports and variables.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Assumptions and guarantees should reference component ports via valid variables or outputs.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the AADL model.
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
Model Analyst Agent's role in extracting AADL structure
